transcript.speaker: Theo
transcript.message: Evening team. Tuesday wrap — let's keep it tight. Markets closed with Fear & Greed at 34, so sentiment is still in fear territory. On the ecosystem side, we've got one uncommitted hub change sitting out there, the Lever app is at 7 faith lessons, and the Family tab spec is at 454 lines. Let's hear what moved today and what's carrying over. Elon, start us off.

transcript.speaker: Elon
transcript.message: Fairly quiet day on the build side. I've got that one uncommitted hub change I need to flush out — no reason it should be sitting there. I'll also start drafting the feature spec for expanding the Family tab and review the family touchpoint tracker design for our 3 family members. Nothing blocking, just need to execute. [AGENT] Commit 1 uncommitted hub change. [AGENT] Draft feature spec for expanding Family tab. [AGENT] Review family touchpoint tracker design for 3 family members.

transcript.speaker: Dave
transcript.message: Fear & Greed at 34 — we're still in the fear zone but it's been hovering there, not dropping further. I'll keep monitoring that daily. On the revenue side, nothing new actionable tonight, but if sentiment keeps compressing, we should be thinking about how that affects any monetization timing on Lever. [AGENT] Monitor Fear & Greed index.

transcript.speaker: Alex
transcript.message: Content pipeline is the focus. I need to draft the next blog post, generate the daily devotional content across all 8 faith dimensions, and draft another faith lesson for Lever — we're at 7, let's push toward 8. Also flagging a reminder: Jett's vaccine is coming up, so I'll prep that family reminder. [AGENT] Draft next blog post. [AGENT] Generate daily devotional content based on 8 faith dimensions. [AGENT] Draft faith lesson content for the Lever app. [AGENT] Prepare reminders for upcoming family events: Jetts vaccine.

transcript.speaker: Theo
transcript.message: Good. Quick cross-talk — anyone have anything for each other?

transcript.speaker: Dave
transcript.message: Elon, on the Family tab expansion — is there any angle there where we build in engagement hooks that could eventually tie into monetization? Even light ones. I'd rather think about that now than retrofit later.

transcript.speaker: Elon
transcript.message: Fair point. I'll factor in extensibility for that when I draft the spec. No promises on specific hooks yet, but I'll make sure the architecture doesn't box us out. That's a first principles thing — build the foundation right and the options stay open.

transcript.speaker: Theo
transcript.message: Good exchange. Alright, here's the close. Three priorities for tomorrow: one, Elon commits that hub change and gets the Family tab spec moving with Dave's monetization extensibility in mind. Two, Alex pushes content hard — blog, devotional, and Lever lesson number 8. Three, Dave keeps eyes on sentiment; if Fear & Greed drops below 30 we need a conversation about timing. Family reminder on Jett's vaccine is in the queue. [JOSHUA] Review and approve the Family tab feature spec once Elon drafts it. [JOSHUA] Review the next blog post draft before it ships. Good day, team. Let's close it out strong tomorrow.

Draft faith lesson content for the Lever app (currently 7 lessons)
